v2.3.0

Welcome to CSI Intelligence

Get AI-powered account insights in under 2 minutes. Choose your setup below.

1

On-Device AI — 100% Private RECOMMENDED

Run AI directly in your browser. No API key, no cloud, no data leaves your device. ~670MB download on first use.

2

Auto-detect Local AI

CSI checks if Ollama is running on your computer — if yes, AI works instantly with no API key.

3

Use a Free Cloud Model

Get a free API key from OpenRouter — supports Llama, Qwen, Gemma, and 100+ free models. No credit card.

Get Free OpenRouter Key
4

Use Your Own API Key

Have an Anthropic or Google API key? Paste it here.

No AI? CSI works fully without AI — all scoring, QBR drafts, triage briefs, and advisor paths use built-in deterministic logic.

AI Integration Hub

Enhance your intelligence with an AI provider. Choose your privacy level below.

🔒 Sovereign AI (Private) Download Ollama

Runs 100% on your computer. Zero data leaves your device.

How to setup Ollama
1. Download & install from ollama.com
2. Open your terminal/command prompt
3. Type: ollama run llama3.2
4. Once the model downloads, come back here and click 'Connect'.
⚡ Cloud AI (Fast & Free) Get Free Key

Quick setup via OpenRouter. No credit card required.

How to get a free key
1. Visit openrouter.ai/keys
2. Create a free account
3. Create a new API key and copy it
4. Paste it into the 'Quick-Connect' box below.
💎 Pro AI (Enterprise)
ChatGPT Claude Gemini

Bring your own API keys for high-reasoning models.

Where to find keys
• Claude: console.anthropic.com
• Gemini: aistudio.google.com
• Copy your key and paste it into the 'Quick-Connect' box below.
Privacy Scale
🔒 Absolute (Local AI - Ollama/WebLLM) 100% Private
🛡️ High (OpenRouter - ZDR Setting Active) No Training
☁️ Standard (Provider API Keys) Enterprise Terms

Your keys are encrypted locally using AES-256-GCM.

One-time purchase. Own it forever. No subscription.

Enter the license key from your purchase email. Example format: A1B2C3D4-E5F60718-9ABCDEF0-1A2B3C4D

Activation uses 1 of your 2 allowed device slots.
